---
title: "Structural Equation Modeling"
---


This is the (work in progress) course website for "Structural Equation Modeling".

In this course we will cover the following content:

- [Chapter 1: Introduction to SEM](../chapters/chapter1/chapter1.qmd)

Each chapter contains links to slides and possibly other resources.

## Course Overview

This course provides a comprehensive introduction to Structural Equation Modeling (SEM). You will learn:

- Fundamental concepts of SEM
- Linear regression
- Path analysis and mediation
- Factor Analysis

## Getting Started

Navigate through the course materials using the sidebar on the left. Each chapter may include:

- Lecture notes
- slides
- Exercises
- Additional resources
